title: Kattikida Lyrics Kaaki Sattai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kattikida Song Lyrics From Kaaki Sattai
Lyrics: Anthony Dassan
Singers: Anthony Dassan, Manasi, Anita

Kattikida munnae naam
oththigaya paakkanumdi
kaththukadi maaman kitta
aththanayum aththupadi.

Vida maatten ponnae naaney
unna pichi thinna poren maaney

Kannae un kannam rendum
mulle illaa rosavadi.
ponne un kendakaalu
moagaththathaan thoonduthadi.

oadaadha en pulli maaney
nee illayinna
vembi ponnaen.

Achchaaram potta pinne
aasaikenna velliyadi
Aaththaa un koyillukku
poosa panna naanum redi.

un sannadhi thaedithaaney
ada odi ingu vandhaen naaney.

odhungi podaa thalli
naan mullirukkum kalli.

enai thottuputta
anga ingae kuthi vaippeney

Adikkiriye solli
ara size-u gilli.
enkitta vandha
vaala ottaa narikkiduveney.

Kattikida munnae naam
oththigaya paakkanumdi
kaththukadi maaman kitta
aththanayum aththupadi.

Vida maatten ponnae naaney
unna pichi thinna poren naaney

Thaaram aadhaaram aagappora
saedhaaramaa vaa

Aakka poruththa en maama
unakku
aara porukkalayaa

Vaadi en jodi neethaanadi
orasi paaththukalaam

Vaaren samsaaram aanapinney
pasiya theeththukkalaam

Adi piththaanen unnaala
siththiramey
enna kollaama kolluriye.

Naan dhinusaaga porandheney
unakkaaga valarndheney
allaama alluyire

odhungi podaa thalli
naan mullirukkum kalli.

enai thottuputta
anga ingae kuthi vaippeney

Adikkiriye solli
ara size-u gilli.
enkitta vandha
vaala ottaa narikkiduveney.

mulle illaa rosavadi.
ponne un kendakaalu
moagaththathaan thoonduthadi.

oadaadha en pulli maaney
nee illayinna
vembi ponnaen. (chi paavam)

Achchaaram potta pinne
aasaikenna velliyadi
Aaththaa un koyillukku
poosa panna naanum redi.

un sannadhi thaedithaaney

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kattikida?

The song Kattikida is an energetic dance number that exudes vibrancy and excitement.

Who composed the music for Kaaki Sattai?

The music for Kaaki Sattai was composed by the talented Anirudh.

When was the song Kattikida released?

The song Kattikida was released in 2014.

Who are the singers of Kattikida?

The song is sung by Anitha, Anthonydasan, and Manasi MM.

What kind of occasions is Kattikida suitable for?

Kattikida is perfect for parties, celebrations, and workouts due to its energetic vibe.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kattikida from the movie Kaaki Sattai is a high-energy dance number that captures the essence of celebration and excitement. With Anirudh's dynamic music and the spirited vocals of Anitha, Anthonydasan, and Manasi MM, the song creates an electrifying atmosphere. It is designed to get listeners on their feet, making it ideal for parties and energetic gatherings. The lyrics and beats together convey a sense of fun and liveliness, perfectly aligning with the movie's vibrant theme.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the electrifying energy of Kattikida from the movie Kaaki Sattai, where Anirudh's pulsating beats meet the vibrant vocals of Anitha, Anthonydasan, and Manasi MM. This song is a perfect blend of high-octane music and catchy lyrics that will get you moving. Dive into the dynamic world of Kaaki Sattai with this unforgettable track!
stanzaMeanings: I won't let go of you, girl. I'm going to eat you up, dear.
Dear, your cheeks are like thornless roses. Girl, your anklet makes me want to dance.
My dear, if you're not here, I'll be lost.
After putting on the sacred thread, what more do I need? I'm ready to worship at your temple.
I came running here just to find your presence.
Move aside, I'm like a thorny plant.
If you touch me, I'll jump around here and there.
I'll cut the tail of anyone who comes to me with a knife.
I won't let go of you, girl. I'm going to eat you up, dear.
Come, let's be the foundation and support for each other.
My dear, can't you bear with me for a while?
Come, my partner, let's be together.
I'll come, and after marriage, we can satisfy our hunger.
I'm crazy because of you, don't destroy my image.
I was born for you, I grew up for you, my dear.
Move aside, I'm like a thorny plant.
If you touch me, I'll jump around here and there.
I'll cut the tail of anyone who comes to me with a knife.
I won't let go of you, girl. I'm going to eat you up, dear.
Dear, your cheeks are like thornless roses. Girl, your anklet makes me want to dance.
My dear, if you're not here, I'll be lost. (Oh, poor thing)
After putting on the sacred thread, what more do I need? I'm ready to worship at your temple.
I came running here just to find your presence.
Move aside, I'm like a thorny plant.
If you touch me, I'll jump around here and there.
I'll cut the tail of anyone who comes to me with a knife.
